name: Diwali Premium Hamper
description: A premium festive hamper featuring assorted dry fruits, chocolates, scented candles, and a handcrafted greeting card — all beautifully packaged in an embossed gold box. Perfect for Diwali corporate gifting.

name: Luxury Dry Fruit Box
description: An elegant wooden box filled with premium almonds, cashews, pistachios, and raisins. Finished with a satin ribbon and customizable nameplate.

name: Festive Premium Gift Basket
description: A curated basket of gourmet cookies, artisanal chocolates, premium tea, and aromatic candles wrapped in festive packaging.

name: Traditional Sweet Gift Box
description: Handcrafted Indian sweets — kaju katli, motichoor ladoo, and badam barfi — presented in a royal velvet box. Food-grade certified.

name: Corporate Coffee Mug
description: High-quality ceramic mug with full-wrap printing support. Dishwasher safe. Available in matte black, white, and navy.

name: Branded Steel Bottle
description: Double-wall insulated stainless steel bottle (750ml). Keeps drinks hot for 12 hrs, cold for 24 hrs. Laser-engraving supported.

name: Eco Tote Bag
description: Organic cotton tote bag with reinforced handles. Perfect for conferences, trade shows, and employee welcome kits. Full-color screen printing.

name: Custom Notebook Set
description: Set of 2 A5 hardbound notebooks with 192 pages each. Premium paper (100 GSM), elastic closure, ribbon bookmark. Cover embossing available.

name: Employee Self-Care Kit
description: A wellness-focused kit with organic hand cream, lip balm, aromatherapy roll-on, and a bamboo face towel in a jute pouch.

name: Aromatherapy Desk Kit
description: Premium desk wellness set featuring a soy-wax candle, essential oil diffuser, and lavender pillow spray. Reduces workplace stress.

name: Herbal Tea Hamper
description: Collection of 6 artisanal herbal teas — chamomile, peppermint, turmeric latte, and more — with a ceramic teacup in a premium gift box.

name: Mindfulness Gift Box
description: Guided journal, stress relief ball, essential oil, and herbal eye mask packaged in a calming pastel box. Ideal for employee wellness programs.

name: Executive Desk Gift Set
description: Premium desk set with wireless charging pad, pen holder, sticky notes dispenser, and a faux-leather desk mat. Engraving on all items.

name: Leather Organizer Kit
description: Genuine leather desk organizer with card holder, cable organizer, and pen tray. Available in tan, black, and burgundy.

name: Premium Pen Set
description: Rollerball and ballpoint pen duo in brushed steel finish, presented in a padded gift case with custom engraving on each pen.

name: Wireless Charger Combo
description: Sleek bamboo wireless charging pad with built-in phone stand and additional USB port. Works with all Qi-compatible devices.
